S0.name: Pre-Governance (Retroactive)
S0.goal: All work done before governance layer existed. Retroactively registered.

S1.name: Governance Setup
S1.goal: Establish governance layer, seed registries, build dev dashboard, clear doc debt.

S2.name: Intelligent UI Implementation
S2.goal: Implement intelligence layer across all screens per Phase 7 frozen spec. Sprint A+B+C + polish + code review fixes.

S3.name: API Reality Check + Intelligent PO
S3.goal: Fix 18 API-mismatch bugs (CR-023), add API cache (CR-024), build coverage-based Intelligent PO for Request Stock + Direct Dispatch (CR-025), FEFO Batch Stock Detail (CR-015), wire reference_code as PO number (CR-025 sub-task)

items.title: Slice 1 — Read-only Screens (Hub, Hierarchy, Store Detail, Login)
items.notes: Foundation screens. Read-only. Terminology adapter built. Screen visibility matrix established.

items.title: Slice 2 — Pending Queues, Transfer Detail, Status Timeline
items.notes: Operational inbox. Three queue tabs. Transfer detail with contextual actions.

items.title: Slice 3 — History & Ledger, Date/Status Filters
items.notes: Transfer history with filters. Stock ledger view. Date range support.

items.title: Slice 4 — Transfer Write Flows (Dispatch, Request, Approve, Reject, Receive, Cancel)
items.notes: All transfer mutation flows. Source selector. Confirmation dialogs. 52/52 API tests pass.

items.title: Slice 5 — Stock Adjustment, Wastage, Source Selector, Seed Shutdown
items.notes: 7 phases. Stock adjustment (Central-only), wastage (all roles), wastage report, seed data shutdown, POS API migration. 55/57 QA pass.

items.title: P17 — Amend / Withdraw / Modification
items.notes: Transfer edit/amend by source. Withdraw flow. Status reset on edit.

items.title: P17-Settings — Operational Settings CRUD
items.notes: Settings management screen. Lateral transfer toggle. Config CRUD.

items.title: P18 — Vendor Management CRUD
items.notes: Vendor list, create, edit, delete.

items.title: P19 — Add Stock / Procurement
items.notes: Procurement form with vendor, batch, expiry, unit selection.

items.title: P20 — Stock Inventory Summary (Self-Store)
items.notes: Self-store inventory view. 14/14 FE + 11/11 BE tests pass. Hierarchy toggle deferred.

items.title: P21 — Catalogue CRUD (Ingredient/Product/Recipe/Addon-Recipe)
items.notes: Full CRUD for 4 catalogue types. 17/17 FE + 19/19 BE tests pass.

items.title: P21-Gaps — Food Category + Addon CRUD + Ingredient Rename
items.notes: Gap closure. 17/17 FE + 30/30 BE tests pass.

items.title: P22 — Daily Consumption Report
items.notes: Consumption report with date filter, role scoping. 12/12 FE tests pass.

items.title: P23 — Hierarchy Management + Bundle Push
items.notes: Hierarchy CRUD, franchise push, store creation. 12/12 FE tests pass.

items.title: P24 — FEFO Batch Stock Detail Panel
items.notes: API validated (19 probes). 3-phase implementation complete. GAP-1 (store name) + GAP-2 (action buttons) fixed. QA PASS iteration_41.

items.title: P20-Phase2 — Stock Inventory Hierarchy Toggle
items.notes: Hierarchy toggle for Master/Central users. Heatmap, KPI, alert banner. 12/12 tests pass. ~155 lines added. | Re-QA required: useStockInventory.js hook + api.js getStockInventory param lost during repo sync. Fixed 2026-06-13. Awaiting re-test.

items.title: P21-Smart — Smart Dispatch / Request Assistance
items.notes: Brainstorm-level planning only. Low-stock suggestions on dispatch form. ~10-15h estimate.

items.title: P25 — Wastage Report Enhancements
items.notes: Enhanced wastage report features. API validated.

items.title: Read-only mode banner still shows after write flows implemented
items.notes: Cosmetic. Text update deferred. Write flows work regardless.

items.title: Transfer History lacks store type badges
items.notes: Backend limitation. History API doesn't return restaurant_type. Store names shown correctly.

items.title: Stock Ledger N+1 API calls (lazy-loads transfer details)
items.notes: Acceptable at current scale. Needs dedicated ledger API from backend for production.

items.title: Before/After quantity always shows dash
items.notes: Backend limitation. No before/after data in API. Owner approved (Q-S3-010: A).

items.title: Actor names display as numeric IDs instead of names
items.notes: Backend limitation. No user name resolution API. Owner approved (Q-S3-007: A).

items.title: filter_bucket source selector may fail with batched stock
items.notes: Warning shown to users. Segment mode is default and 100% reliable.

items.title: Stock Adjustment has no history/traceability API
items.notes: No adjustment history API exists. Accepted risk per Implementation Plan Risk #3.

items.title: Wastage ledger rows empty in preprod (no wastage recorded yet)
items.notes: Expected. deriveWastageEntries() ready for when data exists.

items.title: Wastage Report may error for Master/Outlet roles
items.notes: Preprod API scope restriction. Error state with Retry is correct UX.

items.title: add-stock increase API payload estimated (may need runtime adjustment)
items.notes: Decrease verified_ready. Increase payload estimated from docs.

items.title: Edit Transfer button was noop (resolved in P17)
items.notes: Was OI-001. Resolved by CR-006 (P17 Amend/Withdraw).

items.title: Parent store resolution uses hierarchy heuristic
items.notes: Works with current data. May need refinement for complex hierarchies.

items.title: Date range filter is client-side only (seed data ignores params)
items.notes: Works with real POS API. Seed data (now removed) was the cause.

items.title: Test entities 787/788/789 created in live POS during P23 probing
items.notes: Created during API investigation. Still exist in POS preprod. Need cleanup.

items.title: Negative stock exists in legacy data
items.notes: Legacy data from before strict enforcement. Does not affect new transfers. May confuse stock reports.

items.title: Intelligent UI Freeze — Screen Intelligence Layer
items.notes: ALL 24 screens approved. Phase 7 frozen. Implementation handed off to CR-021.

items.title: Daily Intelligence Digest (SMS + WhatsApp + Email)
items.notes: Auto-generated daily summary: expiring items, stale approvals, stores needing restocking. Channels: SMS, WhatsApp, Email. Owner confirmed: next phase, not now.

items.title: Intelligent UI Implementation — Sprint A+B+C + Polish
items.notes: Retroactive registration. 22+ screens upgraded, 6 new files, 26 modified. 55/55 tests PASS + 6 additional screen fixes + Procurement 3-mode upgrade. Governance gap: work started without CR registration.

items.title: Code Quality Review Fixes — Security + React Patterns
items.notes: Retroactive registration. Hardcoded secrets removed, array-index keys fixed, stale closure fixed, empty catches logged.

items.title: display_qty string causes TypeError in arithmetic operations
items.notes: POS API returns display_qty as string. Arithmetic without Number() wrapper caused toFixed() TypeError. Fixed by wrapping in Number().

items.title: API Reality Check, Data Seed & Intelligence Gap Fix
items.notes: Fix 18 API-mismatch bugs from audit. Proper control gate this time.

items.title: API Response Cache — Performance Optimization
items.notes: In-memory cache with TTL. 71→20 API calls (72% reduction). Gate waived (velocity exception).

items.title: Coverage-Based Intelligent PO — Request Stock + Direct Dispatch
items.notes: Coverage selector (3/7/10/30d), consumption-based ordering, threshold fallback, integrated dispatch table. Gate waived (velocity exception).

items.title: P28 — Production Unit Module (Production Run UI + History)
items.notes: Production Run form + audit detail + history (G-018 stub). 3 new files, 6 modified. Backend gaps: G-018 (history list API), G-019 (segment unit_cost). Owner requested 2026-06-13.

items.title: Navigation Restructure — Grouped Sidebar (INWARD / PRODUCTION / OUTWARD / REPORTS / SETTINGS)
items.notes: Grouped sidebar sections: DASHBOARD, INWARD (Vendor Management, Raw Material Master, Purchase), PRODUCTION (Sub-Recipe Master, Run Production, Production History), OUTWARD (Store Management, Product Catalog, Stock Inventory, Pending Queues, History & Ledger), REPORTS (Consumption, Wastage), SETTINGS. Renames: Vendors→Vendor Management, Ingredients→Raw Material Master, Add Stock→Purchase, Products→Product Catalog. Remove Recipe + Addon Recipe as separate nav items (absorbed into Product Catalog). Hierarchy Summary merged into Store Management.

items.title: Product Catalog Overhaul — Excel-like Bulk Editor + Inline Recipe/Addon/Sub-Recipe Linking
items.notes: Full redesign of Products page → Product Catalog. Excel-like spreadsheet UI with: inline cell editing, bulk upload (Excel import), Excel export, column toggles, mandatory category enforcement, search + filter, unsaved changes indicator, + Add Item quick row. Each product shows linked Recipe, Sub-Recipe, and Addons inline. Expand row to see ingredient BOM from sub-recipe. Category is compulsory — UX enforces without friction. Reference: owner-shared screenshot of bulk editor pattern.

items.title: Stock Inventory Split — Finished Goods vs Raw Materials Tabs
items.notes: Split Stock Inventory into tabs: Finished Goods (items with subrecipe_id / is_sub_recipe) and Raw Materials (ingredient type). Each tab shows own KPIs, own table. Optional 'All' tab for power users. Clarifies the inward/outward confusion — raw materials are inward procurement, FG is outward distribution.
